free_text: Nuclear reactions of Ga69 and Ga71 with 13-56 MeV
protons
Most of the cross sections have been corrected for
precursor decay during irradiation and prior to
chemical separation except for 69Ga(p,p4n)65Ga,
71Ga(p,2pn)69Zn, 71Ga(p,3p2n)67Cu.
Data from CPX file compiled in 1964/67 by
F.K. McGowan et al.
Estimated overall uncertainty,
based on systematic errors, decay scheme
uncertainties, and reproducibility of results.
Converted to EXFOR format by IAEA-NDS
OS. Country code corrected.
Converted to new date formats; BIB update.
OS. ERR-ANALYS added, REACTIONs in subs.
5-11,17-25,27 corrected, DECAY-DATA in sub.27
corrected.
DECAY-DATA corrections in subs. 24,26,27
